datapoints.description: Disk read operations per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: read_iops

datapoints.description: Disk write operations per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: write_iops

datapoints.description: Disk read throughput in bytes per second
datapoints.name: read_throughput

datapoints.description: Disk write throughput in bytes per second
datapoints.name: write_throughput

datapoints.description: In-progress I/O operations on the disk
datapoints.name: io_depth

description: Per-disk Portworx IOPS, throughput, latency, I/O depth, and used capacity via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Per-disk metrics from px_disk_stats_reads/writes (counter, rate for IOPS), px_disk_stats_read_bytes/write_bytes (counter, rate for throughput), px_disk_stats_read_latency_seconds/write_latency_seconds (gauge, converted to ms), px_disk_stats_progress_io (gauge), and px_disk_stats_used_bytes. Disk device paths are sanitized for instance IDs. Instances grouped by node.
name: Portworx_Disk_Performance
